# Authors And Attribution

## Upstream Project

This repository is derived from Crocoddyl:

https://github.com/loco-3d/crocoddyl

Crocoddyl was originally developed by the loco-3d project and contributors,
including the authors and contributors listed in the upstream Crocoddyl
`README.md` and `PUBLICATIONS.md`.

Please cite Crocoddyl when using this codebase in academic work:

Carlos Mastalli, Rohan Budhiraja, Wolfgang Merkt, Guilhem Saurel, Bilal
Hammoud, Maximilien Naveau, Justin Carpentier, Ludovic Righetti, Sethu
Vijayakumar, and Nicolas Mansard. "Crocoddyl: An Efficient and Versatile
Framework for Multi-Contact Optimal Control." IEEE International Conference on
Robotics and Automation, 2020.

## Contact-ID Extensions

The contact-identification extensions in this repository were added for
research on differentiable contact estimation and inertial-parameter
identification.
